title: Golden Globes 2026 Betting Analysis
text: William Hill's sportsbook analysis of Golden Globes 2026 reveals significant wagering activity has centered on two frontrunners ahead of the 2026 Golden Globes ceremony. Timothée Chalamet, starring in Marty Supreme, has experienced the most dramatic odds movement. His chances shortened considerably from 4/7 to 1/5, reflecting heavy backing from bettors. The leading alternative contenders include Leonardo DiCaprio and Ethan Hawke at 5/1 each. William Hill's spokesperson noted that Chalamet has received consistent support from our customers for his performance in Marty Supreme, making him one of the worst results in the book. Jessie Buckley, known for Hamnet, represents an even more dominant market position. Her odds compressed dramatically from 1/5 to 1/20 following substantial backing, including a four-figure bet on her victory. Competitors Renate Reinsve and Jennifer Lawrence trail significantly at 8/1 and 20/1 respectively. The betting markets suggest these two performers stand as clear favorites in their respective categories heading into the awards ceremony.
